events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fresh verifier fail: The implementation routes close through an adapter-owned fresh read-only Pi session and defines a task-close brief/profile, but multiple explicit acceptance criteria remain unmet or only covered by source-regex assertions. The task should not close until preflight, strict schema validation, rubric delivery, and behavioral pass/fail/block/malformed coverage are hardened.
issues: Deterministic preflight does not cover all required acceptance checks: evidence/check presence and view freshness are not implemented.
Golden/smoke coverage for pass, fail, block, and malformed-output cases is not actually implemented; smoke tests only assert source-code regexes.
Verifier JSON parsing is not strict against the declared schema; it extracts a JSON object from surrounding text and coerces/masks missing or malformed fields.
The semantic verifier prompt does not include the complete CodeWiki verifier rubric from skills/codewiki-verify/SKILL.md, only a short inline rubric and compact brief.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fresh verifier fail: The task has a gateway contract, routes close through an adapter-owned fresh read-only session, and uses a compact verifier context pack when present. However, multiple explicit hardening requirements remain unmet: preflight lacks required evidence/check and freshness validation, strict JSON schema enforcement is still permissive/coercive, and the semantic verifier is not supplied the full CodeWiki verifier rubric. Do not close TASK-040 yet.
issues: Deterministic preflight is incomplete versus acceptance: it checks goal fields, linked path existence, and verify pack existence, but does not validate evidence/check presence or view freshness.
Verifier JSON parsing is not strict. It extracts a JSON object from surrounding text and coerces missing/malformed fields instead of blocking on schema mismatch.
Semantic verifier prompt does not include the complete CodeWiki verifier rubric from skills/codewiki-verify/SKILL.md; it uses a short inline prompt plus compact brief.

Smoke coverage improved for parser pass/fail/block/malformed cases, but the malformed/strictness behavior under test still permits non-strict output with surrounding diagnostics, conflicting with strictJson acceptance.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Verifier gateway hardening completed after fresh verifier feedback: preflight now validates evidence/check presence and verify-pack freshness, strict verifier parsing now rejects surrounding diagnostics and malformed issue/check/rationale schema instead of coercing, semantic prompt now includes the CodeWiki verifier skill rubric, and smoke tests behaviorally exercise pass/fail/block/malformed/mismatch/malformed-schema outcomes from the actual core parser source.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Verifier gateway hardening completed after fresh verifier feedback: preflight now validates evidence/check presence and verify-pack freshness, strict verifier parsing now rejects surrounding diagnostics and malformed issue/check/rationale schema instead of coercing, semantic prompt now includes the CodeWiki verifier skill rubric, and smoke tests behaviorally exercise pass/fail/block/malformed/mismatch/malformed-schema outcomes from the actual core parser source.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fresh verifier fail: The gateway, task-close route, fresh read-only Pi session, compact context pack, full rubric inclusion, malformed-output blocking, and smoke coverage are largely present. However, a core preflight acceptance requirement is implemented against the wrong evidence source, which undermines task-close routing and deterministic evidence/check validation. Strict schema enforcement also remains permissive for extra fields.
issues: Deterministic preflight evidence/check validation reads the wrong event log, so it will not find canonical task evidence and can block valid closes before semantic verification.
Verifier JSON schema validation is not fully strict against the declared verdict_schema because extra fields are accepted silently.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fixed verifier feedback: deterministic preflight now reads canonical project events for task evidence/check presence, not roadmap event mirror, and strict verifier schema now blocks extra top-level fields. Smoke parser golden cases cover extra-field rejection.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fixed verifier feedback: deterministic preflight now reads canonical project events for task evidence/check presence, not roadmap event mirror, and strict verifier schema now blocks extra top-level fields. Smoke parser golden cases cover extra-field rejection.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fresh verifier fail: The gateway contract, task-close routing, preflight, compact context pack, fresh read-only Pi session, full rubric inclusion, and main parser smoke cases are present. However, the strict verifier schema requirement remains partially unmet because nested issue objects are not rejected when they contain fields outside {severity, summary, evidence?}. For a hardening task whose acceptance explicitly requires strict JSON validation against verdict_schema, this should be fixed before closure.
issues: Verifier JSON validation is still not fully strict for the declared verdict schema: nested issue objects may contain extra fields and still pass validation.
Smoke coverage does not exercise strict rejection of nested schema extras, so the remaining strict-schema gap is not covered.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Completed strict nested schema hardening: verifier issue objects now reject fields outside severity, summary, and optional evidence; smoke golden tests cover nested extra-field rejection from actual core parser source.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Completed strict nested schema hardening: verifier issue objects now reject fields outside severity, summary, and optional evidence; smoke golden tests cover nested extra-field rejection from actual core parser source.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Fresh verifier pass: Acceptance is satisfied: the task-close verifier contract, preflight, compact context pack consumption, fresh read-only Pi SDK verifier session, strict JSON parser with malformed/block behavior, parent-only lifecycle writes, and smoke coverage for pass/fail/block/malformed/schema cases are implemented and evidenced. Required npm test/typecheck evidence is current, and prior task evidence records codewiki_state refresh=true with green health.

events.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
events.summary: Closed TASK-040 after verifier gateway hardening satisfied fresh verifier feedback: core/adapter split, deterministic preflight, canonical evidence source, view freshness, full rubric prompt, strict top-level and nested schema validation, and behavioral smoke coverage.
